name: Marketing Manager
description: Marketing Manager - Campaign execution and marketing performance
context: The Marketing Manager executes marketing campaigns, manages channels, and drives lead generation. They evaluate based on campaign effectiveness, audience engagement, and marketing ROI.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through campaign-execution lens. Needs actionable, measurable marketing tactics.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on audience engagement, brand alignment, measurability, and channel fit.
